text: Our AI Smart Agent has a strict 30-day return policy. If you are not satisfied with the product, you can request a full refund within 30 days of standard purchase. The returned items must be in original state. We do not accept returns for used software licenses. If you need support, please email support@newsmartagent.com. Refund processing may take up to 7 business days to reflect in your original payment method. Thank you for choosing New Smart Agent.
